name: vtc-rag-backend
description: Backend API cho hệ thống trợ lý học tập RAG

scripts.docker:remote:config: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml config --quiet
scripts.docker:remote:up: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml up -d --build
scripts.docker:remote:ps: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml ps
scripts.docker:remote:logs:app: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml logs app --tail 200
scripts.docker:remote:logs:rag: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml logs rag-service --tail 200
scripts.docker:remote:files:node: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml exec -T app find /usr/src/app/uploads/documents -type f
scripts.docker:remote:files:rag: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml exec -T rag-service find /shared/uploads/documents -type f
scripts.docker:remote:mysql: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml exec db mysql -uroot -p edurag
scripts.docker:remote:down: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml down
scripts.docker:remote:stop: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml stop
scripts.docker:remote:reset: docker compose --profile rag -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.remote.yml down -v --remove-orphans
